label: word for predicate
description: Given a Wikidata item representing a predicate or action, a language, and a lexical category, returns the lemma of the best-ranked lexeme linked to that item (via 'predicate for', P9970) in that language and category. Verb-sense counterpart to 'word for concept' (Z33668) — for concepts whose lexeme link uses P9970 instead of P5137.
summary: New function: verb-sense counterpart of Z33668 'word for concept', following P9970 ('predicate for') instead of P5137 ('item for this sense'). Same signature so callers can dispatch by category.
